title: The Future Of AI: Why Equinix Is The Key Player To Watch
text: Owning physical buildings for data centers might seem like a low-return investment for high-growth tech companies. Equinix specializes in providing physical buildings for data centers.

title: REIT Earnings Preview: When The Tide Goes Out

title: 1 Potential Powerhouse AI Stock You Won't Want to Miss
text: AI will need data centers (especially those closer to end-users) to drive its adoption. Equinix is ideally positioned to support AI, given its large-scale and growing global data center portfolio.

title: 5 REIT Stocks to Buy Ahead of Q1 2023 Earnings Results
text: We have narrowed our search to five U.S. REITs that are set to report first-quarter 2023 earnings results. These are: AGNC, REXR, VICI, EGP and EQIX.

title: Prediction: 3 Growth Stocks That Could Trounce the Market
text: Brookfield Asset Management expects to grow at a 15% to 20% annual rate in the coming years. Equinix's expansion-related investments should power its continued growth.

title: Equinix (EQIX) to Expand Into Montreal With New Data Center
text: As part of its expansion efforts into Canada, Equinix (EQIX) announces a new data center facility in Montreal with an investment of $50 million.

title: 2 New Buy Alerts With A 9% Dividend Yield And High Upside

title: Equinix Expands in Montreal to Support Growing Financial Services, Gaming, Aerospace Sectors
text: REDWOOD CITY, Calif. and MONTREAL, April 5, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- As Montreal continues to expand its position as a world leader in industries such as Visual Effects (VFX), gaming, financial services and aerospace, Equinix, Inc. (Nasdaq: EQIX), the world's digital infrastructure company™, today announced a new state-of-the-art International Business Exchange™ (IBX®) data center in Montreal.

title: MEDIA ALERT: Equinix Sets Conference Call for First-Quarter Results
text: REDWOOD CITY, Calif. , April 3, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Equinix, Inc. (Nasdaq: EQIX), the world's digital infrastructure company™, today announced that it will hold its quarterly conference call on Wednesday, May 3, 2023 at 5:30 p.m.

title: 10 Stocks Consistently Shower Investors With Big Gains In April
